name: Filling-Line-Complete-Systems-V1.docx
content:
Does C.E. King supply complete filling and packaging lines?

Yes. C.E. King can supply complete filling and packaging line solutions combining liquid fillers, tablet/capsule counters, cappers, labellers, and ancillary equipment. Lines are configured to match your specific production requirements.

Details

  • A typical complete line may include: liquid filler or tablet counter, capping machine, labeller, accumulation table, and conveyor systems
  • Lines can be configured for pharmaceutical, nutraceutical, food, cosmetic, and chemical applications
  • King Technofill fillers integrate with King Cappers and third-party labellers for liquid filling lines
  • King Technocount or Hypercount machines integrate with cappers and labellers for solid dose counting lines
  • The King UC3 Accumulation Table can be added for smooth product flow between machines
  • C.E. King provides line layout guidance, integration support, and commissioning services
  • For complete line enquiries, contact sales@ceking.com with: product type, container sizes, required output per hour, and industry sector
  • Individual machines can also be purchased separately and integrated into existing lines
  • The sales team regularly helps customers design complete lines from initial concept to installation
  • Site visits and installation support available — contact the sales team to discuss
